emails.subject: Help!
emails.body: Please read the attached. This is one of my friends from the "B" group. She is a free-lance writer for several magazines. Do you know of anyone she could interview? What not you? Debra Perlingiere Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3885 Houston, Texas 77002 dperlin@enron.com Phone 713-853-7658 Fax 713-646-3490 Forwarded by Debra Perlingiere/HOU/ECT on 06/15/2000 11:24 AM "Susan Avera Roth" <roths@orbitworld.net> 06/15/2000 09:23 AM
